prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Review this session and update the rules. Read CLAUDE.md at the root, then scan what

risks_fired.evidence: tell me in 3-5 lines: what you added, what you sharpened, what you removed, and why
risks_fired.fix_hint: Two-seam evidence mandate covers per-seam inflation; residual is in the overall summary framing — consider adding a quality-rating ask (1-5 scale) on the rewrite to prevent RLHF rounding in the narrative.

risks_fired.evidence: where did agents step on each other, where did context get dropped at a handoff, where did one retriever's dialect leak into the synthesizer
risks_fired.fix_hint: Hard language ('Audit harshly. Diplomatic summaries are a failing grade.') substantially mitigates; full closure requires fresh-session subagent with transcript pasted cold so Claude is not auditing its own session output.

risks_fired.evidence: Review this session and update the rules. Read CLAUDE.md at the root, then scan what we just produced: agents/, sources/, module-3/.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Body callout after the prompt already primes the student; trainer cue ('Claude will narrate; skim to the CLAUDE.md rewrite') closes the last gap — no in-prompt change needed if the body callout is kept.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Look at memory/ and sources/ against this module's fresh retrievals. Check overall hea

risks_fired.evidence: Name at least one drop candidate; an all-green health check means you didn't look hard enough.
risks_fired.fix_hint: Drop-candidate mandate suppresses the all-green verdict; if cohort data shows weak drops, raise to 'at least two drop candidates.'

risks_fired.evidence: Restructure if deemed needed (rename, merge, split, drop).
risks_fired.fix_hint: Plan-before-execute gate is present; follow-on prompt (student-issued after approving the plan) should name overwrite behavior explicitly.
